claim_boundary: EVT0 acoustic/audio-hardware design review: off-the-shelf part selection, purchasability, tolerances, spacing, neighbor interaction, occlusion, and bottom-edge congestion. NOT a production release; SPL/SNR/leak/ingress remain lab-measurement blockers per acoustic-validation.json.

components.name: Bottom speaker — 1115 micro box speaker
components.recommended_mpn: Goertek 1115F (15x11x3.5mm box speaker, 8 ohm, 1W, F0 ~850Hz) / AAC 1115 box equivalent
components.chinese_source: Goertek / AAC direct; Shenzhen Qianhai Wuxing Semiconductor; open 1115/1511 driver market

rear_chamber_volume_cm3.note: low end of band; SPL not yet measured

components.neighbor_interaction: USB-C 6.53mm (>=1.0 target, comfortable); LRA 8.3mm is main vibration neighbor, decouple chamber gasket from LRA bracket; bottom mic 27.25mm good acoustic isolation
components.occlusion_collision_risk: none; bottom-firing -Y slots; USB saddle 0.5mm to chamber wall (tight, non-colliding, verify seal)
open_issues: rear chamber at low end of volume target; measure SPL before acoustic claims

components.name: Earpiece receiver — 1206 dynamic receiver behind cover-glass slot
components.second_source: Open Shenzhen 10-12mm dynamic receiver/earpiece module market (Alibaba)
components.chinese_source: Goertek / AAC direct; Shenzhen receiver-module market

tolerances_mm.note: tightest acoustic seal on device; control glass bond-line + gasket compression-set together

components.neighbor_interaction: front camera 11.3mm and top mic 10.25mm both >10mm; no acoustic crosstalk at top
components.occlusion_collision_risk: none; +Z slot under top bezel, bonded glass clear of slot channel
open_issues: behind-glass leak path is dominant earpiece risk; needs lab leak/SPL through compressed gasket
verify slot channel does not telegraph through bonded glass cosmetically

components.name: Bottom mic — bottom-port MEMS with molded sound tunnel to -Y
components.recommended_mpn: Goertek S08OB381 (bottom-port analog MEMS, 3.50x2.65x0.98mm) e.g. S08OB381-026 = LCSC/JLCPCB C2684423; digital variant Goertek S15OB381 (e.g. S15OB381-050)

tolerances_mm.note: tunnel length is acoustic risk not collision; keep short/straight

components.neighbor_interaction: USB load-path separation met by ~10x; speaker 27.25mm far enough to avoid back-pressure desensitization
components.occlusion_collision_risk: none; verify molded tunnel does not intersect USB-C reinforcement saddle
open_issues: tunnel length vs HF roll-off and dust trapping; minimize
SNR through molded tunnel + mesh is lab blocker (>=60dB)

components.name: Top mic — noise-cancel MEMS, port on +Y top face
components.recommended_mpn: Goertek S15OT421 (top-port digital MEMS) e.g. S15OT421-001 = JLCPCB C5160216, S15OT421-005 = C2684419, S15OT421-017 (DigiKey/LCSC); SNR ~59-64dB
components.second_source: Match SAME MEMS model/vendor lot as bottom mic for sensitivity/phase matching
components.neighbor_interaction: earpiece 10.25mm and front camera 32.0mm clear; 134.55mm baseline to bottom mic is excellent for 2-mic beamforming
open_issues: match top+bottom mic sensitivity/phase via single-vendor lot

bottom_edge_fit_assessment.question: Do USB-C + speaker + bottom mic fit side by side on the 78mm-wide bottom edge with clearance?
bottom_edge_fit_assessment.layout: bottom mic + speaker on left third (X~14mm), USB-C centered (X=34mm); features do not stack
bottom_edge_fit_assessment.note: USB saddle-to-speaker-chamber 0.5mm is tight but non-colliding; flag for seal verification, not a clash

blocker.statement: No EVT design blocker. All four parts are real, purchasable off-the-shelf Chinese parts; bottom edge fits with margin. Remaining items are standard lab-measurement blockers (SPL/impedance, mic SNR, earpiece SPL/leak, ingress) that gate production release per acoustic-validation.json, not the EVT design.
watch_items: speaker rear chamber at low end of volume target; measure SPL before acoustic claims
bottom-mic molded tunnel length; minimize for HF response and dust
match top/bottom mic vendor lots for beamforming
